---
title: "Eleanor Jane Chute"
---

## Eleanor Jane Chute

**Dates:** (1854/5-1944)

**Maiden name:** (Portal)

### Description

wife of [[person:299]Chaloner Chute] and president of the council of the Girls\' Friendly Society

### Letters

- Letter from Febry 15th [1901]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
